steps.title: Convert percentage to multiplier
steps.content: Interpret 111% of x as multiplying x by 1.11: $$f(x)=1.11x$$.

steps.title: Identify type of function
steps.content: This is a linear function of the form $y=mx+b$ with slope $m=1.11$ and intercept $b=0$. Since the slope is positive, the function increases as $x$ increases, so it is increasing linear. That matches choice D — D is correct.
